targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS "time", symbol AS metric, close AS value FROM prices WHERE interval='1d' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts::timestamptz AS "time", symbol AS metric, rsi AS value FROM indicators_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(ts::timestamptz) ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts::timestamptz AS "time", symbol AS metric, macd_hist AS value FROM indicators_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(ts::timestamptz) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 新闻情绪 (日均, LLM 打分)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', published) AS "time", symbol AS metric, avg(sentiment)::float AS value FROM news WHERE sentiment IS NOT NULL AND symbol IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(published) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: ★ 社区情绪 (日均, T212 Community)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', published) AS "time", symbol AS metric, avg(sentiment)::float AS value FROM t212_community WHERE sentiment IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(published) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts, symbol, rule, direction, strength FROM signals WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY ts DESC

panels.title: 社区热帖 (近 3 天, 按赞数)

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol, likes, sentiment, left(content, 80) AS content, author, published FROM t212_community WHERE published > now() - interval '3 days' ORDER BY likes DESC LIMIT 30
